heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 21053 Authorization of appropriations
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 15453 of Title 42

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for grants under this subpart $10,000,000 for fiscal year 2003.

children.heading: Availability of funds
children.label: b Availability of funds
children.text: Amounts appropriated pursuant to the authorization under this section shall remain available, without fiscal year limitation, until expended.
